title: MINE_WAIT_SECS=300 is tight for congested testnet mempool
description: MINE_WAIT_SECS=300 allows only 5 minutes for the tx to be mined. Zcash testnet block time is ~75 seconds, yielding approximately 4 blocks in the budget. Testnet is occasionally run by few miners; block times can stretch to 5-10 minutes during low-hashrate periods. A single slow block eats the entire budget. The mine-wait loop also polls at MINE_POLL_SECS=10 intervals, which is fine, but the outer timeout is too tight. Recommend MINE_WAIT_SECS=600 (8 blocks at 75s, covers one slow block at 10 min). This is separate from PAYMENT_TIMEOUT_SECS=600 which covers send_payment itself; together they create a 20-minute window which is acceptable for an ignored integration test.
